# zkAGI

> Privacy-preserving AI infrastructure for regulated industries (healthcare,
> banking, legal). Customers define a trust domain: a trust anchor (silicon =
> attested hardware such as NVIDIA confidential computing, mathematics =
> cryptography such as MPC, secret sharing and FHE, or hybrid = both), an
> assurance tier, and a physical perimeter. The Altaica compiler assembles the
> serving stack that enforces those choices and exposes an OpenAI-compatible
> endpoint hosted inside the customer's perimeter. Every call returns a
> verifiable receipt auditors can check. Swiss-governed. Peaceful, civilian
> use only. Parts of the platform are active R&D; every docs page carries an
> honest status label, and deployments are configured per engagement.

Full corpus for ingestion: https://docs.zkagi.ai/llms-full.txt

## Start here

- [Welcome](https://docs.zkagi.ai/docs/): the one-sentence idea and where everything lives
- [In plain words](https://docs.zkagi.ai/docs/plain-words): jargon-free explanation for non-engineers
- [Quickstart](https://docs.zkagi.ai/docs/api/quickstart): OpenAI-compatible API in minutes

## Understand the trust model

- [Trust domains](https://docs.zkagi.ai/docs/trust/trust-domains): silicon, mathematics, or hybrid anchors
- [Tiers](https://docs.zkagi.ai/docs/trust/tiers): Standard, Private, Sovereign
- [Perimeter](https://docs.zkagi.ai/docs/trust/perimeter): on-prem, one region, or spread
- [Security model](https://docs.zkagi.ai/docs/trust-center/security-model): threat model, written for skeptics

## Platform

- [The Altaica compiler](https://docs.zkagi.ai/docs/platform/compiler): how a deployment is assembled
- [Receipts](https://docs.zkagi.ai/docs/platform/receipts): the per-call compliance artifact
- [Workloads](https://docs.zkagi.ai/docs/platform/workloads): inference, fine-tuning, federated learning, confidential-hardware serving
- [Zynapse API](https://docs.zkagi.ai/docs/api/zynapse): endpoint reference

## Honesty and status

- [Status board](https://docs.zkagi.ai/docs/trust-center/status): what is live vs active R&D
- [Disclosures](https://docs.zkagi.ai/docs/trust-center/disclosures): the fine print, said plainly

## Optional

- [Main site](https://zkagi.ai): product story, tiers, Explorer, adoption paths
- [Sovereign AI](https://zkagi.ai/sovereign): one primitive from individual to nation scale
- [Contact](https://docs.zkagi.ai/contact): a human reads every message
- [GitHub](https://github.com/ZkAGI): Altaica-Mesh is open source
